changes.title: Stylesheet import path changed
changes.detail: If you update web-components, your styles need a small change: remove @abgov/styles from your package.json, then point your stylesheet import at the web-components package instead.

changes.title: Pagination component
changes.detail: A new Pagination component is now available.

changes.title: Design tokens across the system
changes.detail: The whole design system now uses design tokens, so colour, font, and other value updates reach your team quickly and easily.

changes.title: Input background colour
changes.detail: The background colour for input components is now white.

changes.title: Dynamic dropdown items
changes.detail: Items populated dynamically now update correctly in the dropdown.

changes.title: Documentation updates
bullets: New Skeleton examples for line count and max width.
Added documentation on our supported browsers.
